_comment: Round 4 Variant B — same 50 prompts. The system prompt now includes a single complete worked example (the invert shader from cannedShaders.ts) embedded inline, instead of a list of declarative rules. Hypothesis: the model imitates the example structure better than it follows prose constraints (Variant A regressed when we tried prose rules).
